title: After the Japanese Oaks: The Outline of Magic

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Following a heated race, the competing
Umamusume come to agree with Sweep
Tosho—winning the Triple Tiara is a great
achievement in itself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Zenno Rob Roy even says that watching today's
race has given her courage, and that it was "like
seeing magic at work."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Pleased that someone fell under her spell, Sweep
Tosho begins preparations for her next race—the
Shuka Sho.
